# Cardzy: Digital Wish Cards & Event Invitations (Full Documentation)

> Cardzy is a global web application for creating interactive, animated digital wish cards and multi-event invitation websites with WhatsApp RSVP tracking, Google Maps integration, live countdown timers, and support for 18 international languages.

## Platform Summary

Cardzy (https://cardzy.online) allows users to design, customize, and publish digital wish cards for personal celebrations (Eid, Birthdays, Anniversaries, New Baby, Graduation) and multi-event wedding/party invitation websites (Shaadi, Mehndi, Baraat, Walima, Nikkah, Dholki, Parties).

## Main Features & Workflows

### 1. Digital Wish Cards
- Select from 34+ celebration categories.
- Personalize sender/recipient names, custom greeting messages, font styles, and background themes.
- 3D envelope opening animation with ambient background music and floating particle motifs.
- Shareable via unique URL (`cardzy.online/w/[slug]`) or downloadable as PNG image.

### 2. Event Invitation Websites
- Select from 21+ event types (Weddings, Corporate Events, Parties).
- Manage multiple sub-events (e.g. Mehndi, Baraat, Walima) within a single event hub.
- Real-time guest RSVP tracking integrated directly with WhatsApp.
- Google Maps venue location pins for guest navigation.
- Live countdown timers showing days, hours, and minutes until the event.

### 3. Multilingual Capabilities
Supported languages include:
1. English
2. Urdu (اردو with Nastaliq font)
3. Arabic (العربية)
4. Spanish (Español)
5. French (Français)
6. Hindi (हिन्दी)
7. Chinese (中文)
8. Portuguese (Português)
9. Russian (Русский)
10. German (Deutsch)
11. Japanese (日本語)
12. Korean (한국어)
13. Italian (Italiano)
14. Turkish (Türkçe)
15. Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)
16. Bengali (বাংলা)
17. Vietnamese (Tiếng Việt)
18. Swahili (Kiswahili)
